_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design, build, implement, and maintain a knowledge management framework that provides end-users access to the organization’s intellectual capital.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data governance operating models, including federated, centralized, and hub-and-spoke structures, and the organizational conditions under which each model is appropriate.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-004 (DG, cosine: 0.481), DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.386). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [access, build, capital, design, end, framework] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, centralized, conditions, data, federated, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.871, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Design, build, implement, and maintain a knowledge management framework that pro" and "Knowledge of data governance operating models, including federated, centralized," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.483 > STS 0.386 (gap +0.097). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [access, build, capital, design, end, framework]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, centralized, conditions, data, federated, governance].
